event_info: beaten! 132.8kph; beautiful shape for Siraj. On a length and significant movement off the deck. Samson stays leg-side and has a poke at it. Belatedly pulls his bat in after the ball whistles past the outside edge
137.5kph; short of a good length; leg-lined; nudged into the leg-side

133.2kph; beaten for the second time in three balls. Late outswing and further away movement off the deck as well. Samson defends from the crease and it goes past the edge. Not too far away from the off-stump as well
and again! 136kph; a touch fuller; Samson pushes at it from the crease and luckily for him; the outswinger doesn't trim the outside edge. Siraj has a big smile
Siraj pulls his length back by a fraction; attacks the stumps as well; Samson defends down the pitch
138.9kph; short of length outside off; Samson opens the bat-face and steers it to deep backward point to get off the mark
another play and miss! Short of length wide of off; Samson stays leg-side and mini-hops to slash hard. Extra bounce and the ball bounces over the blade

makes contact and it almost goes all the way! Ample width on offer; Samson throws his arms and flays it over point. One bounce and into the fence. First boundary of the match. 5000 IPL runs for Samson
fuller than a length; Samson doesn't get fully forward and inside-edges the drive to the right of the bowler
145kph; short of length; Samson swings across the line and inside-edges to fine leg. Siraj dives to his right in the deep and makes a tumbling stop. Gill applauds
top shot from Samson! 143.1kph; shortened length from Rabada; the line is wide of off; Samson stands tall and slams it over mid-off for another one-bounce four. Excellent hands!
147.4kph; moves back and defends this length ball on the off-side

that's a gorgeous stroke from the CSK captain. Gentle outswinger from Siraj; Gaikwad accounts for the movement and drives it on the rise through the covers. Finds the gap and the ball dribbles away to the fence. Beautifully timed
136.1kph; back-to-back fours for Ruturaj Gaikwad. Siraj over-corrects and sprays this full delivery onto the pads. Flicked away to fine leg
137.2kph; on a length and around off; driven to mid-off
135kph; slip removed and Siraj bowls a short of length ball. Gaikwad punches to cover
lbw appeal from Siraj but that's missing leg! In-slanter that further nips in as well. Ruturaj Gaikwad flicks and misses to get hit on the pad
134.2kph; width on offer; cut away deep point's right for a couple more
146.5kph; sharp bounce! Lands on a length and gets it to bounce significantly. Samson swings wildly across the line and the ball bounces over his blade
147.4kph; fuller length; no feet movement from Samson who drives and inside-edges to midwicket

ball_event: out Caught by Jos Buttler!! Edged and gone! 148.2kph
event_info: shortened length outside off; Samson sees the width and stays leg-side to slash it through the off-side. All he manages is an outside edge. Easy grab for the keeper. Rabada strikes early and it's Samson who's been in superb form. Sanju Samson c Jos Buttler b Kagiso Rabada 11(15) [4s-2]
fuller than a good length; driven to cover

wow! That's an audacious stroke to get going. Urvil Patel waltzes down the track; moves leg-side in the process; converts it into a half-volley and drills it wide of mid-off. Bullets away to the fence

ball_event: out Caught by Jason Holder!! Kagiso Rabada gets his revenge immediately. After conceding the boundary
event_info: the South African shortens his length and bowls it at 149.2kph. Urvil shimmies down the pitch to pull and is absolutely in no control of the shot. He was cramped for room and the ball was super quick as well. The ball goes up in the air off the top-edge and Holder moves to his left from mid-on to take the catch. Two wickets in the over for Kagiso Rabada. Urvil Patel c Jason Holder b Kagiso Rabada 4(3) [4s-1]
lbw appeal; Gaikwad looks to work this length ball into the leg-side and misses to get hit on the pad. Missing leg with the angle
length ball; pushed to cover
138.9kph; in-slanting length ball on leg; Gaikwad nudges it to midwicket

ball_event: out Caught by Jos Buttler!! Golden duck for Sarfaraz Khan coming in as the Impact Player. Cross-seamer and it's banged in short by Siraj. Sarfaraz wants to go after it with a pull shot first ball. It's shoulder high and the ball balloons up in the air off the top-edge. Jos Buttler calls for it
event_info: settles under it and takes a calm catch. CSK are in a spot of bother having lost three wickets within a span of 8 deliveries. Sarfaraz Khan c Jos Buttler b Mohammed Siraj 0(1)
138.9kph; Siraj greets Brevis with a head-bouncer and the batsman ducks under it
138.1kph; fuller length ball; defensively pushed to mid-on
fullish ball; Gaikwad presses forward to drive it to extra cover
148kph; short of length; punched to point
149.2kph; short of length outside off; Gaikwad opens the bat-face to steer it to third man
148.3kph; fullish delivery; driven to cover off the front foot
146.1kph; beautifully driven off the front foot towards point. A slight misfield and Brevis gets off the mark with a single
pacy short ball at 148kph; good lift as well. Gaikwad respects it and drops his wrists before swaying away from it
87.8kph; tossed up full on middle; Brevis drills it to mid-on off the inner part of the bat
another flighted delivery; middle-stump line; blocked into the off-side off the front foot
92kph; quick away-turner; too wide outside off; left alone
full delivery on the stumps; Gaikwad push-drives to cover
90.4kph; fraction short; Gaikwad goes deep in the crease to cut; finds backward point
93.5kph; full ball; driven to the left of long-off for a couple of runs
another full delivery; eased along the ground to long-off
starts off with a back of a length delivery outside off; Gaikwad runs it down to third man
angling in from back of a length; this one hurried onto him; Brevis gets right behind the line and defends it
good length and angling in; no room whatssoever; Brevis stays back and defends it to the leg side

1 run; GT lose a review; full and angling in; Brevis swings across the line and is struck on the pads; huge appeal was turned down; Holder convinces Gill to go for the review and the ball tracking shows it was missing leg stump
good length delivery outside off; Gaikwad defends it to the off side
full and outside off; Gaikwad pushes it to cover for a quick single
full and outside off; Gaikwad reaches out and flicks it to deep mid-wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Shubman Gill!! Another one bites the dust. Excellent bowling from Suthar
event_info: well flighted on middle; Brevis was looking to go inside out; was beaten the by the flight and skews it way up in the air towards cover; where Gill judges it to perfection; CSK are down and out. Dewald Brevis c Shubman Gill b Manav Suthar 2(9)
tossed up delivery outside off; Dube was looking to push it towards the off side; but it goes off the inside half back to the bowler
tossed up delivery outside off; Dube gets off the mark with a drive to long-off
this one turned; outside off and turning away with an extra bounce; Gaikwad is beaten all ends up
the straighter one; excellent variations from him; pushed this one through quicker; Gaikwad plays down the wrong line and is struck on the pads; loud appeal is turned down; that was missing leg

valiant effort in the deep; but the ball wins; short and wide outside off; Dube gets on top of the bounce nicely and cuts it to deep backward point; the fielder puts in the slide; but couldn't stop it
back of a length and outside off; Dube taps it to the off side and sets off for the single; sent back
on a length and angling across; Dube pushes it to mid-off and sets off for a quick single; Ruturaj was bit late to take off
this one kept a bit low; full and angling in; Gaikwad hangs back in the crease and defends it
cramping him for any room; this one angled in sharply; Gaikwad got into a tangle; but defends it to the leg side
back of a length and this one bounced a bit; Gaikwad gets right behind the line and defends it

1 run; dream delivery to start with; nipping back in from a length; Dube was cut into half as the ball brushes the pads on its way to the keeper; who couldn't hold onto it. Replays show that there was an inside edge. Dropped by Jos Buttler
length and angling across; Gaikwad defends it to the off side
good length and angling across; Gaikwad walks down the track and pushes it to covers
back of a length and angling across outside off; Gaikwad reaches out for it away from the body and misses it
banged in short on middle and leg; Gaikwad works it towards short midwicket and looks for a single; sent back
this time he gets the single; back of a length and slanting across; Gaikwad works it to deep mid-wicket
sharp bouncer; Gaikwad is surprised by the delivery ducks under it
back of a length and angling in; bit of extra bounce; Gaikwad stands tall and pushes it back to the bowler
bit of width on offer; back of a length and outside off; Gaikwad reaches out to it and cuts it straight to the fielder at point
banged in short on the stumps; far too high over the batsman
back of a length and outside off; Gaikwad mistimes a pull to deep mid-wicket; he's not getting his timing right today
good length and outside off; Dube pushes it back to the bowler
breaking the shackles; short and well down the leg side; Dube just had to get some bat on it; he plays it well wide of the fielder to fine leg; 50 up for CSK finally
banged in short on the leg stump; Gaikwad walks down the track and goes for a wild swing; he's hit flush on the hand; the physio comes out as he is in some pain; he looks okay to continue

he's gone big; much needed for him; angling across the right hand; right in the arc; Gaikwad picks it and swings it across the line over deep mid-wicket; finally found one off the meat of the bat today
back of a length and angling across; Gaikwad cuts it straight to the fielder at point
vintage Rutu on display; once again banged in short on the stumps; Gaikwad swivels and pulls it flat to deep square leg; found the gap between the two fielders
full and pushed across; Gaikwad drives it straight to covers
misfieldt from Gill and they get three; pitched up and in the slot; Gaikwad drives it with the full face towards mid off; where Gill slides; but couldn't stop it as it goes towards long-off
cracking shot; Ruturaj is switching gears now - banged in short and at the stumps; he picks the length early; swivels across and then hammers the pull over long leg for a maximum
fuller length delivery on the pads; clipped through mid-wicket for a single
back of a length and angling across the left-hander - Dube stays leg-sided on the back-foot drive to mid-off
on a good length and just outside off - hit high on the bat as Dube pushed it to mid-off
short and at the stumps; pulled through mid-wicket for a single
fuller length delivery on the pads; flicked into the gap wide of mid-wicket for a single
tossed up and sliding across the right-hander - Gaikwad throws his bat on the cut and missed
loopy delivery outside off; Ruturaj plays away from his body and drags a thick inside edge through mid-wicket
that's a poor delivery from Rashid; full and well down leg; Jos Buttler can't stop it and the ball runs away for wides; 5 of them

a big effort from sai Sudharsan; but he's put it down and the ball trickles onto the ropes - very full and at the pads; Dube cleared his front-foot on the swipe and dragged it to the left of deep mid-wicket - Sudharsan ran to his left; dived and got a hand; but can't stop it
lovely; tossed up on off; Dube comes down the pitch; gets undone in the flight but hekept his shape on the lofted drive; back over the bowler's head and over the sightscreen

oh dear! GT are suddenly losing it - fraction short and just outside off; Dube gets under-dge and the ball rolls behind square on the on-side. Jos Buttler went to his left; collected and then lobbed in the throw to nowhere - Rashid wasn't alert to the situation and they take a single as the ball went to long-on
21 off the over; tossed up on middle - Gaikwad bends down low; gets on top of the bounce and then sweeps it backward of square on the on-side

a sitter and Siraj has dropped it; a complete misjudgement - he just stood there and then waited for the ball to come; but he then realises that it's dropping in front of him; so he has to lunge forward at the last moment and floors it. Was a back of a length delivery outside off and Dube was undone by the spongy bounce; hit high on the bat and lobbed up
short of a good length and angling back into the left-hander - Dube looks to pull and misses; off the body and rolls to the off-side

ball_event: out Bowled!! Siraj can relax now
event_info: Arshad has done the job himself. On a good length and angling back into the left-hander - Dube clears his left leg and looks to clout it over the on-side; missed it completely and the off-stump is on the ground. A big wicket; Shivam Dube could've been so destructive in the final few overs. Shivam Dube b Arshad Khan 22(17) [4s-3 6s-1]
nicely played; back of a length and angling across the right-hander - Kartik Sharma waits on it; uses Arshad's pace and steers it behind square on the off-side for a boundary
Arshad shortens the length around off; Kartik Sharma hops across and gets a soft edge that drops down at his feet
banged in short and at the right-hander - pulled behind square on the on-side and he's back for the second
short of a good length and just outside off; whipped down to long-on and Ruturaj runs back for the second; brings up a 49-ball 50; his first this season
clubbed; on a good length and at the stumps - Ruturaj swings across the line; cleared his front leg and then swipes it high over mid-wicket for a maximum
fuller length delivery outside off - Ruturaj swings hard and skews a thick inside edge to mid-wicket
Kartik Sharma attempts a cheeky lap - shuffles right across on the paddle and gets an inside edge onto the pad
banged in short and just outside off - hit slightly high on the bat as Kartik Sharma looked to run it down to third man; rolls down to the fielder
short and just outside off - Ruturaj backs away on the upper-cut towards third man - Shahrukh ran in for the catch; but does well to get his body behind the line when it bounced in front of him
full and following Ruturaj as he came down the pitch; he's early into the swinga nd the toe-end rolls down to mid-on

a skier and two fielders leave it to each other - Manav Suthar and Rashid Khan - back of a length and just outside off; Kartik Sharma swivels across and hits the pull high over square leg. Suthar ran to his left from deep backward square; Rashid to his right from deep mid-wicket; was probably the former's catch; but no one called and they watch the ball bounce in front of the ropes
cheeky and four; on a length and at the stumps - Kartik Sharma shuffles across; uses Rabada's pace and laps it past short fine
short and into the pitch; Kartik Sharma was early into ther pull and mistimes it to the on-side

ball_event: out Caught by Jason Holder!! KG has his man now - banged in short and into the pitch
event_info: Kartik Sharma was in no position on the pull - looks to hack it through mid-wicket and the ball catches the lower half; lobs up to third man where Holder was safely under it. Kartik Sharma c Jason Holder b Kagiso Rabada 15(9) [4s-3]
short of a good length and just outside off; doesn't bounce a lot and goes under Overton's pull. KG is done with the ball today; 3 for 25 are his returns
full and at the stumps; heaved off the inside edge to deep mid-wicket
fuller length delivery and sliding down leg; past Overton's flick and has been wided
banged in short and well wide of off; past Overton's cut and is called as a wide

nicely played; fuller length delivery and it's driven uppishly; wide of Gill's drive at mid-off and the ball bounces away to the ropes. He did get his left-hand to the ball; but it was always going past his reach
thumped; sheer power from Overton - on a good length and just outside off; he stands tall and then bludgeons the lofted drive; high and over long-off for a maximum
nicely played; Overton is providing the final flourish to this innings; short and wide of off - Overton gets under it and then cuts it over backward point for a boundary

nicely played; fuller length delivery on off and Overton plays the field - deep backward square leg had just come in; so he shuffles across and then flicks it very fine; beats the fielder to the right and runs away to the ropes

ball_event: out Caught by Shahrukh Khan!! Overton falls after an impactful cameo - banged in short and into the pitch
event_info: Overton backed himself to clear long-off with the fore-hand slap; but he doesn't get enough on the shot; hit high and down to Shahrukh; who completes the catch. Jamie Overton c Shahrukh Khan b Arshad Khan 18(6) [4s-3 6s-1]
a juicy full-toss and Ruturaj puts it away in style - gets down low and swipes it over square leg; one bounce and over the ropes
good comeback from Suthar; but not sure what Ruturaj was thinking? Slowed down the pace and got it to drift across the right-hander - Ruturaj leans forward and then lets it go
very full and at the stumps; whipped back over the bowler's head; comes back for the second
thumped; full-toss outside off and Ruturaj uses his feet to hammer it back over the bowler's head; almost went all the way; bouncing right in front of the ropes
Suthar slides one full and down leg; past Ruturaj's sweep and has been wided
Suthar keeps it full and almost in the blockhole; driven down to long-on and he refuses the single
smashed; flighted delivery outside off and Ruturaj drills it down past the non-striker - long-off is wide and has no chance despite the dive
tossed up on off; nudged with soft hands past square leg for a single
tossed up on off; a half-forward Gill blocks it out
Hosein slows down the pace on middle; Gill backs away; opens the face of the bat and steers it to backward point

streaky and four; flighted delivery on off; Gill backed away and was then looking to go inside out over cover with the drive; carved it off the outside half and lobs wide of short third - Gurjapneet chases and can't haul it back into play; he then stumbles onto the ropes and hit his knee onto the advertisement board; thankfully; no injury
lovely; flighted delivery on middle; Gill backs away; brinsg his wrists into play and then shovels it high into the stands at wide long-on
Hosein tosses one on off; Gill backs away and then presses forward in defence
beaten; on a good length and seaming away from the left-hander - dragged Sai Sudharsan forward and goes past the outside edge
short of a good length and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan stays low and picks out mid-wicket with the pull
short and wide of off - Sai Sudharsan reaches out and cuts it square on the off-side
on a good length and shaping back into the right-hander - catches Gill's inside edge and thuds into the pad. A big shout for LBW; but they don't review
short of a good length and just outside off - Gill hops across and pushes it to the off-side
short of a good length and just outside off - punched in front of square on the off-side for a single
short and just outside off - doesn't bounce a lot and Shubman Gill plays the half-arm jab; wide of mid-wicket and he's back for the second
lovely; tad too short from Overton - Shubman Gill swivels across; picks the length and then hammers the pull over long leg for a maximum
on a good length and at the stumps; pushed in front of mid-on for a quick single
classy; that's into the 2nd tier - banged in short and at the left-hander; Sai Sudharsan picks the length early; swivels across and then thumps the pull over deep backward square leg
Overton shortens the length outside off - Sai Sudharsan rides the bounce and steers it backward of square on the off-side for a single
on a length and at the pads; clipped into the gap past mid-wicket for a single. 17 off the over
a swish and a miss; Kamboj shortened the length as Gill ran down the pitch - he backs away on the chop and misses; wasn't too far away from the off-stump
on a good length and just outside off - driven crisply and to the left of cover-point - Akeal is quick on the ball and cuts off the single
on a good length and just outside off - dropped with soft hands towards backward point; just a single
tad fuller and just outside off - Sudharsan leans across defensively
on a good length and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan plays with an angled bat and finds backward point with the dab
short of a good length and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan gets on top of the bounce and chops it to cover-point
on a good length and around off; Gill skews a thick inside edge on the prod; a single to deep backward square leg
short and just outside off - Sai Sudharsan shuffles across on the lap; hit high on the bat and the ball drops in front of the keeper - Sanju Samson fumbles and allows a single
fuller length delivery on the pads; clipped straight to the fielder at mid-wicket
length ball on the pads; flicked past square leg for a single
nicely played; was the attempted yorker and it turns out to be a low full-tos; dipped onto the left-hander; but Sai Sudharsan adjusts and plays a one-handed straight drive

a fumble from Kartik Sharma and that allows a boundary - on a good length and just outside off; Sai Sudharsan opens the face of the bat and then plays the steer late; to the right of short third where Kartik dives over the ball

beautifully played; fuller length delivery at the stumps - Shubman Gill picks the length early and then shovels it high into the stands at wide long-on. Brought the bottom-hand into play and reaped the rewards

a chance and Akeal has injured himself; short of a length and just outside off - Gill runs down the pitch and then slaps one square on the off-side - Akeal made ground by running to his right; got both hands and then let the ball slip through his grasp. As he completed the action; he slammed his right cheek onto the ground and winced in pain almost immediately
streaky and four; short of a good length and angling across the left-hander - Sai Sudharsan plays away from his body; gets a thick inside edge and the ball runs past the off-stump
fuller length delivery outside off - a mistimed drive in front of mid-off for a single
tad fuller and on off; Gill looks to drive and gets an inside edge back at the bowler
tad fuller and just outside off - pushed in front of Sarfaraz at cover and Gill is off for a quick single
slightly shorter and turning in; Gill punches it away to sweeper cover
tossed up and too full; Sudharsan drives it down to long-on

out Stumped!! This is excellent glove work from Samson; this was a poor delivery from Noor; down the leg side and turning away; Gill misses out on the flick shot and Samson behind the stumps was too quick as he whips the bails in the flash; with Gill foot in the air. That was lightening quick from Samson and CSK have their first strike. Shubman Gill st Sanju Samson b Noor Ahmad 33(23) [4s-1 6s-3]
fired in full on the pads; Buttler flicks it away to deep mid-wicket
slightly shorter and turning in; Sudharsan goes back and defends it
short and outside off; Sudharsan pulls it away to deep mid-wicket
slightly shorter and turning away; he got some extra bounce; Buttler pokes at it and misses; they all went up in unison; no bat involved
full and tailing in; Sudharsan eases it down to long-on
full and pushed across; Buttler digs it out to mid-off
full and outside off; Sudharsan drives at it away from the body and the ball goes off the inside half to backward square leg
full again from round the wicket; Buttler drags it down to long-on; he's not getting his timing right yet
that has been drilled! Pitched up and in the arc; Sudharsan presents full face of the bat and creams it all along the ground to long-off
angling into the pads; Sudharsan works it off the pads to backward square leg
turning into the pads; Sudharsan works it towards short fine
bit too full from Noor; Sudharsan reaches out and drives it to sweeper cover
straying on the pads; Buttler works it away to deep mid-wicket
once again sliding on the pads; Sudharsan works it with soft hands in the gap to mid-wicket

call again was for two and they make it; turning in from outside off; Sudharsan knocks it in the gap to mid-wicket; the umpire checks whether he had grounded the bat properly at the non striker's end; Sudharsan had not grounded the bat properly and the umpire signals one short
on the pads; Sudharsan flicks it away to deep square leg
slower off cutter to start with; Sudharsan taps it to backward point; a shy at the striker's end; but they make it comfortably
full and outside off; Buttler drives it straight to the fielder at mid off
back of a length and angling in; Buttler pulls it past the diving fielderto deep mid-wicket
excellent stop by Kambhoj; certainly saved a boundary; back of a length and angling across; Sudharsan dabs it to short third man
he induces an edge; but it didn't carry to Samson; slower off cutter; Buttler backs away and slashes at it and the edge falls short of the keeper
that is just exquisite from Buttler; slightly pitched up; he walks into the drive and creams it on the up to deep extra cover; the ball raced away to the fence
short and outside off; Sudharsan goes back and pulls it away to deep mid-wicket
tossed up and outside off; Buttler attempts the reverse sweep and misses it; it almost went off his gloves; but no damage down
sliding into the pads; Buttler works it to deep mid-wicket

acrobatic effort from Brevis in the deep; but he has touched the rope in the process; tossed up delivery on middle; Sudharsan lofts it through the line towards long on; it was in the air for a long time; Brevis judges it well; catches it; but when he was about to throw the ball back into the ground; he lost balance and fell over the ropes; that was an amazing effort; but in the end it's a six
quicker on middle; this one keeps a bit low; Sudharsan works it with soft hands to mid-wicket
flatter and shorter outside off; Sudharsan guides it to short third man; excellent stop by the fielder restricts them to a single
50 up for Sudharsan; quicker delivery; Sudharsan goes back and works it to square leg
top timing from Buttler; fired in full on the pads; Buttler gets to the pitch of the ball and flicks it to deep mid-wicket; he pierced the gap between the two fielders in the deep
excellent comeback; tossed up outside off and turning away; Buttler goes for an expansive drive and misses it; Samson was quick to whip the bails; but Buttler was in
slightly shorter; Buttler punches it to sweeper cover; a fumble at covers and they come back for the second
full and tailing in from round the wicket; Buttler flicks it to deep mid-wicket
short and wide outside off; Sudharsan cuts it to sweeper cover
this is poor bowling; short and down the leg side; Sudharsan kneels down and slogs it way into the stands over fine leg; the partnership between Sai Sudharsan and Jos Buttler is now 50
slightly short and outside off; Sudharsan carves it away to sweeper cover
short and outside off; Buttler punches it straight to the fielder at cover
quicker and slightly shorter; Buttler goes back and cuts it to sweeper cover; the call was for two and they get it comfortably
pushed through quicker; Buttler works it to deep mid-wicket
16 off the over; poor bowling; too short and outside off; Sudharsan rocks back and pulls it over deep mid-wicket; freebie from Hosein and he latched onto it
Sanju Samson appeals for caught behind; Overton says he hasn't heard anything. A skiddy short of length ball; Buttler looks to play across the line and gets beaten by the lack of bounce
128.8kph; turns this length ball in front of square on the on-side for a single

dropped! 147.9kph; hard length; extra bounce and Sai Sudharsan tries to steer it to third man. Due to the extra bounce; it trimmed the batter's glove. Sanju Samson dives low to his left and goes one-handed. Perhaps; he could have gone with two hands. Fails to hold onto it
bouncer down leg and Jos Buttler lets it pass
nudges this length ball into the leg-side
146.5kph; pacy short ball; sits up nicely for Buttler who swivels and slams the pull behind square on the leg-side
136.4kph; back-to-back fours now! Width on offer; cross-seamer; Buttler hops onto the back foot and nicely cuts it to the left of the diving backward point fielder
93.6kph; full and in the slot. Sai Sudharsan presses forward; bends his back leg in the process and lofts it handsomely over long-off. GT seem to be in a hurry
full and on the stumps; clipped through midwicket

93.8kph; round the wicket; a pleading appeal for lbw from Noor; turned down and CSK don't review. It was the googly that spun past Buttler's defensive outside-edge to hit him on the back leg. Too high
cut to cover-point
91.9kph; trifle short and Buttler hangs back to pat it towards backward point
95.4kph; quick and short; Sai Sudharsan pulls to deep backward square leg who takes it on the bounce
shot! Over the wicket; full and on the stumps at 110.6kph; Sai Sudharsan exposes all his stumps by backing away. Crouches low to get under it and thumps it over long-off
136.2kph; leg-lined; worked through midwicket
131kph; round the wicket; angling in on a short of length; Buttler taps it to backward point for a quick single
138.1kph; in-angler on middle-leg; turned through midwicket
112kph; off-speed ball; full and on the pads; flicked through midwicket
off-speed short of length delivery; the line is a bit too straight from Gurjapneet. Sai Sudharsan spots it early and swivels to muscle the pull over deep backward square leg
91kph; drifting in towards leg and Buttler works it through square leg

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Excellent catch in the deep! 87.3kph
event_info: short of length; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot to pull. Hits hard and flat. Seemed like a boundary but Brevis had other ideas. He's air-borne as he dives to his right and takes and snaffles it brilliantly with two hands. End of another fine knock from Sai Sudharsan. Sai Sudharsan c Dewald Brevis b Akeal Hosein 87(46) [4s-4 6s-7]
85.4kph; short of length; wristily pulled to deep midwicket

Jos Buttler finishes in style! Full and drifting in; Buttler slightly backs away; gets under it to bludgeon it straight down the ground. Hits the sightscreen. GT win by 8 wickets with 20 balls to spare!
